scroll.tip.title: Name your scroll here...
scroll.tip.text:
Welcome to the Scroll editor!
Here you may write down anything you wish, and it will be saved to the Scroll upon closing this menu.
There is no text limit. Go wild!

Scrolls support MiniMessage.
item.wingcrafter.quill.tooltip.1: Used by dragons of all tribes to copy scrolls.
item.wingcrafter.quill.tooltip.2: To use, hold an empty scroll in your offhand and
item.wingcrafter.quill.tooltip.3: interact with a scroll placed in the world.
item.wingcrafter.soul_scroll.tooltip.1: A powerful piece of parchment, hidden away from
item.wingcrafter.soul_scroll.tooltip.2: dragonkind inside of the long-lost ancient cities.
item.wingcrafter.soul_scroll.tooltip.3: Its power allows the bearer to cast Animus spells.
item.wingcrafter.tooltip.spellcaster: This item can cast potentially dangerous spells.
death.attack.soul: %1$s yearned for more power than they could handle
tag.item.wingcrafter.dragonflame_cactus_: Not Destroyed Upon Dragonflame Cactus Stem Collision
wingcrafter.config.client.rendering.grou:
Configure how the Soul change notifier renders.

Soul change appears above the soul meter when your soul meter is modified.
wingcrafter.config.client.rendering.soul: Whether the mod should render the Soul change notifier.
The number of pixels (on the Y axis) that the Soul change text is shifted.
wingcrafter.config.client.rendering.grou:
Configure how Soul dialogue renders.

Soul dialogue appears when your soul falls below a certain threshold.
wingcrafter.config.client.rendering.soul: Whether the mod should render the Soul dialogue lines.
The number of pixels (on the Y axis) that the Soul dialogue lines are shifted.
wingcrafter.config.client.rendering.scro: Whether information about the scroll you're looking at requires you to be sneaking to render.
